title: Export
subtitle: Configure and export your manuscript.
formatDescription.epub: Digital ebook for e-readers and tablets. KDP-ready.
formatDescription.pdf: Print-ready layout with precise page formatting.
formatDescription.docx: Editable manuscript for sharing with editors and agents.
formatDescription.txt: Plain text backup. Universal compatibility, no formatting.
docxLayoutDescription.manuscript: Times New Roman 12 pt, double-spaced, 1-inch margins — the international submission standard.
docxLayoutDescription.normseite: German standard page for agents and editors: Times New Roman 12 pt, 1.5 line spacing, justified, approx. 30 lines per page with a wide correction margin.
cmykHint: Outputs a CMYK PDF with black as K-only ink — required by most professional print shops. Leave off for Kindle/KDP, which expect RGB.
excludedHint: Unchecked items are excluded from export
